## Properties

| Property        | Attribute       | Description                                                                                                     | Type                                                                                        | Default     |
| --------------- | --------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `hidePercent`   | `hidepercent`   |                                                                                                                 | `boolean`                                                                                   | `false`     |
| `indeterminate` | `indeterminate` | When true, percentage is ignored, the label is hidden, and the progress bar is drawn in an indeterminate state. | `boolean`                                                                                   | `false`     |
| `percent`       | `percent`       | The current progress as a percentage, 0 to 100.                                                                 | `number`                                                                                    | `0`         |
| `segment`       | `segment`       |                                                                                                                 | `string`                                                                                    | `''`        |
| `status`        | `status`        | The error state of the progress bar                                                                             | `"complete" \| "default" \| "error"`                                                        | `'default'` |
| `tooltipTitle`  | `tooltiptitle`  |                                                                                                                 | `string`                                                                                    | `''`        |
| `valuePosition` | `valueposition` | The value position type of the progress bar.                                                                    | `"center" \| "left" \| "progress-center" \| "progress-left" \| "progress-right" \| "right"` | `'center'`  |
